rule_metadata.author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Potential Discovery Activity Using Find - Linux

rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Discovery Activity Using Find - Linux
id: 8344c0e5-5783-47cc-9cf9-a0f7fd03e6cf
related:
- id: 85de3a19-b675-4a51-bfc6-b11a5186c971
  type: similar
status: test
description: Detects usage of "find" binary in a suspicious manner to perform discovery
references:
- https://github.com/SaiSathvik1/Linux-Privilege-Escalation-Notes
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-12-28
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1083
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: /find
    CommandLine|contains:
    - -perm -4000
    - -perm -2000
    - -perm 0777
    - -perm -222
    - -perm -o w
    - -perm -o x
    - -perm -u=s
    - -perm -g=s
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
